programme.desc: Brad Upton first stepped on stage in September of 1984 and he's never looked back. This ex-grade school teacher is now in his 30th year of comedy and is nearing 6000 lifetime performances. He is a past winner of the Las Vegas Comedy Festival and appeared recently at Caesar's Palace as part of the HBO Comedy Festival. He has spent the last eight years as the opening act for the legendary Johnny Mathis and did multiple shows all over the country with the late, great Joan Rivers. He has also been seen in concert with The Smothers Brothers, Smokey Robinson, Kenny Rogers, Dolly Parton, Lewis Black, George Jones, Glen Campbell, Pam Tillis and many others. Coast to coast all over North America isn't the only place Brad performs. In 2014 Brad headlined in Singapore, Hong Kong, The MGM in Macau and did eight nights in Israel as part of the Comedy for Koby benefit. His new CD entitled, "Brad Uptonogood" is heard regularly on Sirius Satellite Radio and is available online wherever music is sold. He also just released his first DVD entitled, "Brad Upton, Live from the 509".

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: If your type of comedian is someone who reminds us all how funny we all are, Chris Strait is for you! No funny topic is off-limits for this California native but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Today that dream is more alive than ever as he is a 20-year veteran stand-up comedian, TV and radio personality, speaker and writer, who has performed on stages around the world. He has entertained millions in legendary venues ranging from Radio City Music Hall to chow halls in Afghanistan, to colleges, casinos and cruise ships.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Born to a black mother and an Italian father in New York City, Maija Digiorgios comedy centers on the examination of her own mixed-race identity. Digiorgio riffs on Thanksgiving with each side of her family, gender roles between the two cultlures, and her racist grandma in this special.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Tommy Ryman grew up with a new-age, folk singing mother and a traditional, Lutheran insurance-agent father. This XY equation evidently equals: acclaimed comedian. Ryman has earned the title of Semifinalist on NBC's Last Comic Standing. Roseanne Barr, a professed fan, raves she has “never seen anything like Tommy before in her whole life, he is one-of-a-kind, fantastic!” Ryman also recently won the title of Best of the Midwest at the prestigious Gilda's Laugh Fest. Ryman's act can be described as absurdist and clever, masked behind a very likable and innocent demeanor, often thought of as awkwardly charming. He is a favorite among audiences at top clubs, corporates, and colleges around the nation.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Rob Maher: If You Can Make It Here...
programme.desc: Rob Maher proves that he has the most versatile first name in the English language, that your relationship ended because you didn't spend enough money on wrapping paper, and that being an "accident" is worse than being adopted.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham Controlled Chaos
programme.desc: Ventriloquist and comic Jeff Dunham takes to the stage to provide fresh comedic material with his classic puppets.

programme.title: Jay Mohr: Altamont
programme.desc: Straight-talking comedian Jay Mohr tackles subjects from unexpected visitors, bringing up children (and dogs) to working with Chris Farley.

programme.title: Larry the Cable Guy: Remain Seated
programme.desc: Larry the Cable Guy from the Blue Collar Comedy tour stars in his first solo stand-up special.

programme.title: Bob Smiley: You're Just Hungry
programme.desc: Bob Smiley's mind races 100 miles per hour.

programme.title: Jenny McCarthys Dirty, Sexy, Funny
programme.desc: Several popular female comedians shed some light on what it's really like to be a woman.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin You Can Tell 'Em I Said It
programme.desc: Eddie Griffin proves once more that hes one of the worlds premiere comedic talents in this stand-up special You Can Tell Em I Said It.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this "so bad it's still bad" movie where ancient indian gods come back from the dead to torment pretty co-eds and get whipped by Lash LaRue! Grab your whip and join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for The Dark Power!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Lorenzo Lamas is a Bounty Tracker in the movie Bounty Tracker. Bounty Trackers are like Bounty Hunters, except there were presumably already ten thousand other direct-to-video movies called Bounty Hunter (most of them also starring Lorenzo Lamas.) This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about how things change. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Things Are Different Now!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The atom bombs have fallen, and morons are all that remains. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax & MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Hot-headed novelist and former police detective, Ted Lonergan is the only man who can stop the monster in the Los Angeles sewer. Despite his girlfriend's life being at stake , Lonergan is as useful as if he'd never been brought in on the case! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mary Jo and Bridget from RiffTrax.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Hang on tight as a gang of super-powered paranormal operatives takes you on a white-knuckle thrill ride. The excitement starts when a future-seeing Watcher (Dakota Fanning) convinces a telekinetic Mover (Chris Evans) to help steal a briefcase that holds a billion-dollar secret. But to outrun government agents, they must enlist a mind controlling Pusher (Camilla Belle) who could be their salvation - or their doom. Also starring Academy Award Nominee Djimon Hounsou, Push will pull you in completely.

programme.title: Close Range
programme.desc: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff, his obedient deputies, and a dangerous drug cartel in order to protect his sister and her young daughter.

programme.title: Ninja
programme.desc: A westerner named Casey studying Ninjutsu in Japan is asked by the sensei to return to New York to protect the legendary Yoroi Bitsu, an armored chest that contains the weapons of the last Koga Ninja.

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow of a Tear
programme.desc: Ninjutsu master Casey is back and out for revenge when his pregnant wife is murdered.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: When renowned crime novelist Harlan Thrombey is found dead at his estate, Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate. Blanc sifts through a web of red herrings and self-serving lies to uncover the truth behind Harlan's untimely death.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: It's love at first fright when Gomez and Morticia welcome a new addition to the Addams household -- Pubert, their soft, cuddly, mustachioed baby boy. As Fester falls hard for voluptuous nanny Debbie Jilinksy, Wednesday and Pugsley discover she's a black-widow murderess who plans to add Fester to her collection of dead husbands. The family's future grows bleaker when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: New In Town
programme.desc: Renée Zellweger stars as a career woman from Miami who gets transplanted to the Minnesota boondocks in this fish-out-of-water comedy.

programme.title: How To Lose A Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: It's the battle of wills, as Andie (Kate Hudson) needs to prove she can dump a guy in 10 days, whereas Ben (Matthew McConaughey) needs to prove he can win a girl in 10 days. Now, the clock is ticking - and the wildly entertaining comedy smash is off and running in this irresistible tale of sex, lies and outrageous romantic fireworks!

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: When renowned crime novelist Harlan Thrombey is found dead at his estate, Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate. Blanc sifts through a web of red herrings and self-serving lies to uncover the truth behind Harlan's untimely death.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: It's love at first fright when Gomez and Morticia welcome a new addition to the Addams household -- Pubert, their soft, cuddly, mustachioed baby boy. As Fester falls hard for voluptuous nanny Debbie Jilinksy, Wednesday and Pugsley discover she's a black-widow murderess who plans to add Fester to her collection of dead husbands. The family's future grows bleaker when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: A Christmas Switch
programme.desc: Two women magically switch bodies during the holidays and teach each other valuable lessons about family, love, and Christmas cheer.

programme.title: Christmas in the Heartland
programme.desc: Kara and Jessie strike up an unlikely friendship when seated next to each other on a plane headed to the heartland. With both girls visiting family they've never met, they devise a plan to switch places for Christmas.

programme.title: Firehouse Christmas
programme.desc: Firefighter Jenny has fallen in love with Tom. However his ex-wife Mary (a bestselling author) demands a reconciliation if he wants to see his daughter at Christmas.

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks as an orphan gets a job as a shopping mall Santa Claus to hide from a gang of hooligans, only to find out his role as Santa is more than just a disguise.

programme.title: A Dog Named Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. A young man is determined to prove to his family that he can care for a dog.

programme.title: Northpole
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A loss of togetherness spreads across the globe and threatens the Northpole.

programme.title: A Majestic Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Nell finds romance in her effort to save the Christmas Pageant.

programme.title: The Russell Girl
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. Sarah Russell decides to return home and try to heal old wounds.

programme.title: A Lover Scorned
programme.desc: Unsuspectingly Brooke is lured into a bloody plan of murder.

programme.title: A Wife's Suspicion
programme.desc: A forensic investigator begins to suspect her new husband is the serial killer.

programme.title: Death Saved My Life
programme.desc: Jade realizes the only way to escape her abusive husband is to pretend she died.

programme.title: Bury The Past
programme.desc: After Alice killed her abusive husband in self-defense, she went into hiding.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: When a cell phone signal causes apocalyptic chaos, an artist is determined to reunite with his young son.

programme.title: It Follows
programme.desc: Jay becomes trapped by a vicious curse, and the only way to save herself is to put others in harm's way.

programme.title: Scary Stories to Tell in the Dark
programme.desc: On Halloween, Stella and her two friends meet a mysterious drifter and uncover a sinister notebook of stories.

programme.title: Scary Movie 4
programme.desc: The house Cindy lives in is haunted by a little boy, and she goes on a quest to find out who killed him.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: A story of family, religion, hatred, oil and madness.

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: A drunken U.S. Marshal and a Texas Ranger help a stubborn teenager track down her father's murderer.

programme.title: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: A spiritual woman embarks on a dangerous quest with a convicted killer.

programme.title: The Queen
programme.desc: After the death of Princess Diana, Queen Elizabeth II struggles with her reaction to a sequence of events

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: Karate master Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita) goes to Boston to attend a military reunion. While there, he visits with Louisa, the widow of his former commander, and meets her granddaughter, Julie (Hilary Swank) whose parents have recently died in a car crash. When Julie surprises Miyagi with her knowledge of karate, he takes her to a Buddhist monastery for training and to help her come to terms with her grief.

programme.title: Raising Waylon
programme.desc: Reg and Julia, unconventional godparents to a nine-year old boy named Waylon are blindsided when his parents die and they are left to care for the boy.

programme.title: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: One family redefines friendly competition as three siblings ruthlessly compete in a series of challenges to determine the winner who will hold the family cup for the following year.

programme.title: To Gillian On Her 37th Birthday
programme.desc: A grieving widower must accept his wife's death to save himself and his relationship with his daughter.

programme.title: Three On A Couch
programme.desc: In order to convince his psyhiatrist-fiance to marry him and honeymoon in Paris a man must don various disguises to help cure three of her women patients.

programme.title: You Were Never Lovelier
programme.desc: Love story and musical set in Latin America.

programme.title: A Night To Remember
programme.desc: Mystery writer Jeff Troy (Brian Aherne) and his lovely wife Nancy (Loretta Young) move into a Greenwich Village basement apartment in order to gather material for Jeff's new book.

programme.title: The Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Arabian Nights-type of tale stars Agar as a deposed prince trying to free his people from the evil rule of the caliph, the princess Narah (Lucille Ball) and his vizier, played by Burr. Agar enlists the aid of harem girl Patricia Medina and together they win back the province, while zipping around on a flying carpet.

programme.title: Indiscreet
programme.desc: Cary Grant is the suave American diplomat who pretends to be married in order to preserve his bachelor status. Ingrid Bergman is the glamorous leading lady of the London stage who has no scruples about having an affair with a married man.

programme.title: Love with the Proper Stranger
programme.desc: Natalie Wood and Steve McQueen star as a charming, footloose musician and the innocent Macy's salesgirl who is carrying his child.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: Filmed on location in Glasgow, Isle of Man and Dover, this film centers on Frank (Peter Mullan), a newly laid-off middle-aged man who seeks to soothe his own strained familial relations and shore up his own self-confidence by doing the near impossible - swimming the English Channel. As Frank plunges headlong into his challenge, his family is swept along on the tide of his faith and strength. Also starring Academy Award®-nominee Brenda Blethyn.

programme.title: Road to Zanzibar
programme.desc: The crazy Yanks are back and barnstorm their way through Africa trying to raise funds to get back to the U.S.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: An adventure that follows a masked outlaw as he investigates mysterious raids on the old western front

programme.title: Reap the Wild Wind
programme.desc: Cut-throat salvagers who profit from the wrecks of transatlantic cargo ships move from exploiting shipwrecks to causing them.

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Holiday Engagement

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: It's Christmas in York. Jules, 16, knows all she and her dad really need for Christmas is love. Jules attempts to set up her dad online with a girlfriend - what could go wrong? Plenty...

programme.title: Christmas in The Heartland
programme.desc: Kara and Jessie strike up an unlikely friendship when seated next to each other on a plane headed to the heartland. With both girls visiting family they've never met, they devise a plan to switch places for Christmas.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London Mitchell who is known as a Scrooge has previously lived an unscrupulous lifestyle, by divorcing his wife, barely seeing his children, and dumping a woman a month before Christmas to be with somebody else.

programme.title: What We Do For Love
programme.desc: Sophie secures a job at the famous wellness firm but soon clashes with the chief life coach Jason.

programme.title: What Happened Last Night
programme.desc: Two college students, Danny and Sarah, are strangers until they wake up together after a night of partying.

programme.title: A Remarkable Life
programme.desc: There are many things in life that could do a number on a man's masculinity. Lenny Babbitt has his identity and manhood challenged when his wife Tracy leaves him for a female doctor named Iris who has been treating their autistic son Isaac.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Tiny receives notice that his bar will close unless he pays $17,000 and his customers rally around him with a plan to save it meanwhile Jay's hazing practices start to raise red flags.

programme.title: Miracle on Highway 34
programme.desc: A diverse set of characters find themselves together in an old diner in a small town on Christmas Eve during a snowstorm. While a young expecting couple tries to make it home on a night that's anything but silent.

programme.title: The Ultimate Gift
programme.desc: A deceased billionaire leaves his spoiled adult grandson a series of odd tasks to perform in order to receive the ultimate gift, with the resentful grandson having no idea what that might be.

programme.title: Santa Trap
programme.desc: Santa Claus (Dick Van Patten) winds up in jail after a 7-year-old sets a trap in order to prove his existence to her family (Robert Hays, Shelley Long).

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A loan shark (Ross Kemp) sees his past, present and future after the spirit of his former partner visits him on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: A Dog Named Christmas
programme.desc: A Hallmark Hall of Fame original movie. A developmentally challenged young man sets out to convince his family & their rural community to participate in a local shelter's inaugural "Adopt a Dog for Christmas Program."

programme.title: Angel is Dead
programme.desc: Do-Kyung meets Ga-In on a boat headed to an isolated island. At that night, they spend the night together.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Hyun-jung is worried about her younger sister who has vanished and tracks down her sister's last whereabouts.

programme.title: A Man and A Woman
programme.desc: Two strangers meet at a pickup area for their children's camp by chance. And They get a short trip together.

programme.title: The Queen of Crime
programme.desc: As a meddling mom begins investigating her son's $1,000 water bill, she instinctively detects a crime behind it.

programme.title: New Year New Us 2: #LoveGoals
programme.desc: On a mission to maintain a successful marriage in a city full of temptation, Bakari & Imani are trying their best to get on the same page. But just when things seem to be getting back on track, secrets and lies threaten to tear down everything they've built.

programme.title: Sucker for Love
programme.desc: A young woman seeking love, finds herself in countless failed relationships, and eventually ends up assaulted and incarcerated all in the same day. Confused, hurt, and lonely Tasha, looks to God for the answers.

programme.title: Sudden Passion
programme.desc: After reconciling, Ashley and her husband Timothy decide moving to a new town will help them get over infidelity in their marriage. Everything seems to be going great until Ashley gets a job at the local law office and begins a new affair with her boss, Bernard.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: A hit man (Michael Shannon) keep his violent profession secret from his wife (Winona Ryder) and kids.

programme.title: Husband for Hire
programme.desc: Lola must marry a man approved by her dad before her approaching birthday or she will lose her share of the family fortune. With Nadine Velazquez and Mario Lopez.

programme.title: Mega Shark vs. Giant Octopus
programme.desc: Strange things are afoot in the depths of the sea. First a passenger plane vanishes over the Pacific Ocean. Then an oil platform is obliterated. Marine biologist Emma MacNeil (Deborah Gibson) is dispatched to investigate the phenomena, and, with the help of Japanese scientist Seiji Shimada (Vic Chao), she makes a discovery that will rock the world: An enormous prehistoric shark and a giant octopus have been awakened from their icy slumbers -- and they're hungry.

programme.title: Shark Attack 3: Megalodon
programme.desc: In the third installment of the "Shark Attack" saga, marine researchers make a startling discovery: the most menacing beast that ever ruled these waters is still alive.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Thrill Seekers
programme.desc: When intrepid reporter Tom Merrick discovers that the same man appears in photographs of major disasters over a hundred-year period, he embarks on an incredible action-filled race against time to prevent a series of new disasters.

programme.title: Nowhere to Land
programme.desc: After deadly nerve gas is planted on a plane, a pilot must safely land a 747 between Hawaii and LA: the longest flying stretch without a place to land in emergencies. Starring Jack Wagner.

programme.title: Titanic II
programme.desc: On the 100th anniversary of the original voyage, a modern luxury liner christened "Titanic II" sets sail.

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: Rubí: Traición
programme.desc: Rubí y Héctor se besan, él confundido evita a Maribel Alejandro queda a cargo de un proyecto importante en el hospital Héctor busca a Rubí para platicar y ella le hace creer que lo quiere y deben de alejarse porque no quiere hacerle daño a Maribel.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Dura traición
programme.desc: Fernando descubre a Rosario y a Armando intentado huir del pueblo. Fernando mata a Armando y a Rosario al saber que lo ha traicionado. Gabriela sospecha que Fernando la engaña con otra mujer.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Cuadro destrozado
programme.desc: Alguien en la mansión destruye el cuadro de Mili y su madre, por lo que todos tienen un culpable en la mira, poniendo a Luciana como la principal responsable. Karla cae en la trampa de Damián y Fernando.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Fuera del viñedo
programme.desc: David quiere que Marta se disculpe con Lilian por haberla golpeado, pero ella se niega. Por otro lado, David le dice a Graciela que Marta se irá del viñedo y ella se pone feliz con la noticia.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le dice a Matilde que piensa que Rosario podría ser su madre y le pregunta si le asustaría la idea ella responde que si Rosario fuera su madre, el padre Urbano se lo habría dicho. Catalina le dice a doña Juana que quiere casarse con Adolfo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Más pronto de lo que esperas
programme.desc: Santa le dice a Maricruz que la mamá de Solita ha regresado y la está buscando Simona pierde el control y saca a su hijo de la cuna diciendo que se deshará de él.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Locura
programme.desc: Daniela se pone mal al saber que Rodrigo está volviéndose loco. Isadora le pide a Francisco que no la abandone y pronto se deshaga de Sofía. Sanjuana entristece al saber que Hilario la está engañando.

programme.title: Teresa: Duras decisiones
programme.desc: Teresa no piensa perder más su tiempo y está decidida a divorciarse de Arturo si él no deja de desconfiar de ella. Juana le confiesa a Teresa el gran amor que siente por Cutberto.

programme.title: María, la del barrio: Sin recuerdos
programme.desc: Soraya se alegra al saber que María ha muerto. A raíz del incendio en la cárcel, la familia de María piensa que está muerta y están esperando identificar los cuerpos.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina le quita el respirador a Santiago y logra hacer que muera. María Mercedes recibe la triste noticia de que Santiago ha muerto.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: El licenciado Robles le informa a María Mercedes que tiene que presentarse al entierro de Santiago, debido a que ahora es su viuda. Jorge Luis se sorprende al saber que María Mercedes fue la esposa de Santiago.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se presenta con Marimar y le da las gracias por haber retirado las demandas además de pedirle la custodia de su hija Inocencia le confiesa a Sergio su amor.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio es expulsado de Valle Encantado y Bella investiga las razones. Bella se enfrenta al gobernador y le pide una explicación sobre la expulsión de Sergio.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: El licenciado Robles le informa a María Mercedes que tiene que presentarse al entierro de Santiago, debido a que ahora es su viuda. Jorge Luis se sorprende al saber que María Mercedes fue la esposa de Santiago.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se presenta con Marimar y le da las gracias por haber retirado las demandas además de pedirle la custodia de su hija Inocencia le confiesa a Sergio su amor.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Enriqueta le pide a Felipe que se aleje de Sandra. Ivana le pide a Leonor que la ayude a romper el compromiso de Valentina y José Miguel. Ivana le confiesa a Leonor que Federico está dispuesto a divorciarse de ella.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Crisanta cree que Timo está interesado en Iluminada. Valentina y José Miguel pasan un día de alegría en la feria del pueblo. Leonor le deja en claro a Federico que nunca le dará el divorcio.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Felipe le pide a Moisés que lo ayude a reconquistar a Sandra. Gabriela comienza a sentir una gran atracción por Horacio al verlo cantar en la feria. Horacio vuelve a enamorarse de Ivana al verla llegar a la feria con un vestido muy provocador.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Rosendo descubre que Ivana es la responsable de que el pueblo haya humillado a Valentina. Moisés le pide a Enriqueta que acepte el noviazgo de Sandra con Felipe. Rosendo enfrenta a Ivana para pedirle que se aleje de Valentina.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le cuenta sus deseos a Cristóbal sobre algún día poder llegar a ser padre. Por su lado, Asunción se muestra preocupada al ver que Hipólita se ha escapado de la casa.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Juana le confiesa a Diego que Hipólita tiene un hijo de Luis. Juana le dice a Hipólita que la única manera en que ella se puede quedar en México es estando separada de su hijo.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Martín le informa a Luis que Hipólita está en el convento y su criada se fue con el bebé. Fray Álvaro le dice a Luis que cumpla con sus funciones maritales y lo culpa por el estado de Esperanza.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Hipólita recibe un mensaje muy importante de Martín gracias a la ayuda de Margarita. Por su parte, Luis le ofrece a Hipólita ayuda para poder salir del convento.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: La muerte de la nana
programme.desc: Ivana huye de la hacienda después de empujar a Benita por el balcón. Iluminada va a la fiesta de Felipe y Sandra para decirle a José Miguel del accidente de Benita. Leonor le reclama a José Miguel por ver a Valentina.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Doble asesinato
programme.desc: Leonardo es un policía que planea casarse con Julia. Elisa vive un momento de felicidad cuando su padre, Augusto, le regala una galería de arte. El destino de ambos se cruza cuando Augusto y Julia aparecen muertos en el mismo vehículo.

programme.title: La usurpadora
programme.desc: Una joven humilde se deja manipular por su hermana gemela para que la reemplace y ella se pueda ir con otro hombre.

programme.title: La gata: Amistad entre la basura
programme.desc: Pablo invita a Esmeralda a su casa para darle algo de comer, pero ella lo rechaza porque tiene que ir a pedir limosna Lorenza encuentra a Esmeralda en su casa y le dice que no piensa permitir que esté cerca de Pablo.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Una dura vida
programme.desc: Máximo echa a Ana Paula y a su familia de su casa después de que Ana Paula se negara a ser suya. Ana Paula llega a la hacienda de Rogelio para comenzar a trabajar como enfermera.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Terrible discusión
programme.desc: Antonio le dice a Victoria que no le dejará la empresa a Bruno, pues no es un hombre responsable. En medio de una discusión con Bruno, Antonio sufre un accidente.

programme.title: La desalmada: La tragedia
programme.desc: Carmelo amenaza a Santiago para que firme la venta de sus tierras. Isabella llega a la Ciudad de México en compañía de sus padres, y se reencuentra con Rafael y David. Santiago y Fernanda celebran su boda, pero sufren una tragedia.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Chio les cuenta a Paco, Fran y Toña que Víctor la dejó porque aceptó ser amiga de un hombre que conoció en una red social. Chio trata de convencer a Paco de pagar un increíble viaje para que ella pueda encontrar al hombre perfecto.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: La tía de Fran se muda al mismo edificio que él para cuidarlo. Chayo obliga a Fran, Paco y Toña a seguir todas las reglas que quiere.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvia instala internet de alta velocidad en su departamento, sin embargo su conexión está muy lenta pero lo que no sabe es que los vecinos conocen su contraseña y todos se conectan a su red.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Lorena está cansada de que Frankie no consiga trabajo y a él se le ocurre una gran idea: abrir una academia de actuación basada en el Método Rivers.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Nace la Leyenda
programme.desc: Sin nada que perder y dejando sus penas atras, comienza la historia de estos cinco personajes que son unidos por el destino y el amor a la música.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: El Vítor lleva a su mamá a la central camionera porque se va a regresar a su pueblo. Albertano y el Vítor se conocen cuando van a ver un cuarto en renta y se pelean por él, pero Rosita, una de las inquilinas, les aconseja compartir la habitación.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: El Vítor solicita trabajo en la base de microbuses y Albertano le pide que le consiga trabajo. El Vítor contrata a Albertano como su ayudante. Albertano renuncia porque el Vítor se aprovechó de él y no le pagó bien.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido tiene un mal día y se preocupa mucho cuando Plutarco le confiesa que se casó con la hija de su jefe porque está embarazada.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido recibe una llamada del papá de Gaby quien lo amenaza diciéndole que sí su hija no regresa en 24 horas a su casa, quedará despedido. Plutarco le dice a su padre que no permitirá que su esposa se vaya, así que decide renunciar.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido no logra conseguir trabajo y tiene tres meses de renta atrasados. Martina piensa cómo conseguir dinero para pagar la escuela. Plácido se disfraza de pordiosero para conseguir dinero el dinero de la renta.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Don Justo le ofrece a Plácido regresar a trabajar bajo una condición que a él, no le parece. Por falta de pago, a los López les cortan el teléfono, el gas y la luz. Gaby y Plutarco le dan una noticia a Plácido.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles: El sueño angélico
programme.desc: María de Todos los Ángeles es una mujer que siente que se está haciendo vieja sin haber encontrado el amor de su vida. Ella tiene un sueño en el que los ángeles anuncian que pronto el amor de su vida va a llegar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel se alegra al descubrir que no tuvo intimidad con Sabrina. Roberta se pelea con Mia por llamar a Alma mentirosa. Madariaga le entrega a José una carta que le dejó Gastón antes de morir. Roberta se enoja con Martín y decide huir a casa de Alma.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia experimenta un conflicto por la relación de Franco y Alma. Mía habla con Alma sobre la relación que tiene con su papá y le exige que no salga con él. Miguel le reclama a Sabrina por hacerle creer a Mía que pasaron la noche juntos.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: La mamá de Celina no la deja entrar a la boda de su hermana, al igual que a Vico, porque se avergüenza de ella, pero su novio la consuela y experimentan algo que no habían hecho antes. Se alistan los permisos para grabar el disco de RBD.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Se alista la grabación del disco de RBD. Roberta se pone muy triste por que extraña a Alma, pero no puede perdonarla por tanta soledad que sintió cuando era niña, así que Martín la consuela. Mía confronta a Alma y Franco frente a Roberta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Tras una artimaña de León, Reverte es despedido del colegio y Roberta les confiesa a sus compañeros que el profesor es su padre. Se hace una fiesta de despedida para Reverte y Miguel sufre un desmayo, es llevado al hospital y cae en estado de coma.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía llora desesperada porque Miguel puede morir. León amenaza con destruir la carrera de Alma Rey sino saca a Roberta de la escuela. Raquel desenmascara las mentiras de Sol y la afirma que nunca podrá ser una top model por su estatura.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León influye en los directivos de la escuela para expulsar a Roberta. Diego decide dejar la banda para proteger a Roberta de su papá. Mía se siente orgullosa de Franco y le pregunta si Miguel algún día abrirá los ojos.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta, Diego y Martín Reverte arman un plan para que León sea encarcelado por los fraudes que cometió, pero León los descubre y lo impide. Alma llama a León para informarle que un amigo de ella tiene información comprometedora sobre él.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Santiago idea un plan para enamorar a Aurora. Eduardo le confiesa a Fernanda el gran amor que siente por ella. Fernanda teme que Erika descubra que Eduardo no la ama.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo teme que Fernanda lo rechace al saber su verdadera identidad. Artemio se molesta al saber que Lucio mató a René. Gardenia idea un plan para enamorar a Eduardo.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Damián lleva a cabo sus planes para lograr que Vladimir trabaje en la empresa de Gonzalo. Bárbara le hace creer a Gonzalo que Eduardo no es el buen hombre que dice ser.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Damiana llega al hospital a visitar a Federico mientras Deborah está ahí. Consuelo aconseja a María del Carmen que se aleje de Federico. Cristina le dice a Federico que está embarazada y el hijo es del doctor Robles.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: El doctor Robles le pide a Cristina que reconsidere su decisión de romper su noviazgo. Cristina acepta las condiciones de Federico excepto renunciar al nuevo bebé. Raquela es llevada a la iglesia para ser exorcizada.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: José María le pide a Carlos Miguel que deje tranquila a María del Carmen. María del Carmen le propone a José María que se vayan a vivir a Ojo de Agua. El doctor Fabián le cuenta a Carlos Miguel sobre los estudios realizados a Federico.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Desde su silla de ruedas y envuelto en odio, Federico apunta su arma a José María que baja de unas escaleras. Damiana interviene y le dice a Federico que deje de apuntarle.

programme.title: La Inocente
programme.desc: La historia de una mujer con problemas mentales que tiene que enfrentar un embarazo.

programme.title: El juicio de los hijos
programme.desc: Una viuda es acusada por su suegra delante de sus hijos de que uno de ellos es el producto de un amorío.

programme.title: La Inocente
programme.desc: La historia de una mujer con problemas mentales que tiene que enfrentar un embarazo.

programme.title: Natacha
programme.desc: Al morir su madre, una joven sale del convento donde estudia y trabaja como sirvienta en una casa rica.

programme.desc: Un campesino deja su pueblo y va a la ciudad, su esposa trabaja como sirvienta y él se emplea en una estación radial.

programme.desc: Una huérfana se casa con un hombre malvado y abusivo, que trata de hacerla trabajar en un burdel.

programme.title: Siempre tuya
programme.desc: Un campesino deja su pueblo y va a la ciudad, su esposa trabaja como sirvienta y él se emplea en una estación radial.

programme.title: Pedro Páramo
programme.desc: Un ranchero llega a Comala en busca de su padre, porque al morir su madre le pide que vengue su total abandono.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: No quieras correr antes de saber caminar
programme.desc: Joan es una joven que tiene que lidiar con la escuela, el trabajo y su hijo la maternidad es una etapa de la vida que requiere de tiempo y atención.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Amar y saber, todo junto no puede ser
programme.desc: Luciana, una mujer recién jubilada, debe adaptarse a su nuevo estilo de vida. Aura e Iván viven con ella y con el tiempo entienden cómo y a quién amar.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cuando alguien visita es porque algo necesita
programme.desc: Cómo un padre de familia, en su afán de obtener dinero fácil, no le importa involucrar a sus seres queridos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Después de perder a su padre, una joven se reencuentra con su madre, quien se dedica a la profesión más antigua del mundo. Ella deberá entender y ayudar a su madre.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que a buen árbol se arrima, buena sombra le cobija
programme.desc: Anselmo ha tenido que dejar sus estudios por problemas económicos, pero al ganar una beca gubernamental podrá continuar con ellos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho, a fondo: Amar no es sólo querer, también es comprender
programme.desc: Lili es una niña con trastorno de identidad de género que, con la ayuda de su familia, deberá superar los obstáculos que la sociedad le impone.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Aunque sean del mismo barro, no es lo mismo bacín que jarro
programme.desc: Arturo, un joven prometedor, se verá envuelto en el tráfico de drogas gracias a su hermano Norberto, quien además robó los ahorros de la familia.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Es noche de eliminación y uno de los escuadrones deja la competencia. Los pequeños cumplen el reto de canto de Miguel Bosé con sorprendentes resultados. Los capitanes se enfrentan al reto del "Botonera".

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La competencia entra en su recta final y cada prueba será decisiva para los escuadrones. Yuri se une como juez invitada. Los capitanes comparten una parte de su vida con el público. Verónica Castro recibe una sorpresa de parte de su nieta.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: A un paso de la final
programme.desc: Los pequeños reciben como invitada especial a Lucero. Albertano pone a prueba la honestidad de los capitanes. Las parejas tendrán que demostrar sus habilidades en una prueba de baile improvisado.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños llegan a la semifinal y uno de los tres escuadrones sentenciados será eliminado. Prince Royce canta a lado de los pequeños sus mejores éxitos. Los capitanes pasan un día especial junto con los jueces.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Narcosubmarinos: Viaje al fondo del mal
programme.desc: Por décadas el narcotráfico ha navegado sigilosamente por los mares más peligrosos para transportar su mercancía, poniendo en peligro la vida de sus tripulantes a cambio de dinero.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una familia destruida tras un ataque inesperado habla sobre todo lo que sufrieron al perder a sus seres queridos en manos de organizaciones delictivas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: El hijo del Chapo: Captura y liberación de un intocable
programme.desc: El ejército mexicano despliega un operativo en Culiacán, Sinaloa, para detener a un familiar de Joaquín Guzmán Loera, 'El Chapo'. El objetivo es capturado y, durante un día, Culiacán queda atrapada en un enfrentamiento entre el ejército y los narcos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Fentanilo la nueva apuesta del narco

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: While in St. George, Utah, Tom learns of a junkyard with hundreds of solid old cars, where the owner never sold anything and never allowed anyone inside. Tom makes a few phone calls and sweet-talks his way into Blake's Auto Salvage.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: This Dodge Challenger was parked in the early '90s and hasn't been touched since. Can Davin bring it back to its former glory and get it running and driving again?

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: Last time we got this iconic 1970 Dodge Challenger TA 340 Six Pack running, but we weren't satisfied with just that. We wanted to see it back on the road again too. (We also wanted to give it a good detailing!)

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Cliff who has a great collection of cars but Tom's main interest is with Cliff's son's 1957 Austin A35. The 1957 Austin A35 was restored by an anonymous person as part of a charity program.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: From his starting point in Midland, Texas, Tom and the Ford wagon cover solid ground and make it to Lubbock, Texas before a grouping of cars held captive behind a chain-link fence capture his attention.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom heads to Great Britain in search of some exotic barn finds and has some great luck at his first location where he discovers a Mercedes-Benz 500SEC AMG and a Jaguar XJS TWR.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom forgoes driving his 1939 Ford Woody Wagon in favor of another car that he's owned for years: his Fern Mist 1953 Ford Ranch Wagon.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: It has always been Tom's dream to open up a barn door and see either a Jaguar XK120 or 140 Roadster sitting inside. Tom gets to relive his dream twice when he finds two Jaguar XK's sitting only a quarter-mile from one another.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Repo Outside the Box
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Monster of a Problem
programme.desc: Lyndah and Matt confront a confused debtor who is as quick with his questions as he is with his knife. Then, Lou and Lyndah interrupt a seaside party to repo a motorboat away from a gaggle of misguided youths. And, Lou, Froy, and Sonia head to the dirt track to repossess a car from an event promoter. They seem to be able to reason with him, but his monster truck-driving brother with no respect for human life may prove to be a problem.

programme.title: Hooligans and Explosions
programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Reading, Painting, and Physical Education
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: Heavy Hitters
programme.desc: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy stake out the baseball bus that got away and this time, they've got a foolproof plan. Lou, Matt, and Froy head to a late-night construction site to repossess an enormous crane. And, Sonia and Froy face their worst nightmare when a gang of bikers follows them back to the office.

programme.title: Ruffians and Wrestlers
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when they take an order to repossess from a squad of wannabe backyard wrestlers.

programme.title: Everybody Just a Child?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Off the Hitch
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Planet 4K
programme.sub-title: South America - From Chile to Patagonia
programme.desc: The film takes you on a journey that begins deep in the rainforest and ends in Patagonia with its glaciers and snow-capped volcanoes. During the earth's formation, the South American continent evolved as the most autonomous of the continents. The area developed its own unique flora and fauna, jungles with unbelievable biodiversity, climbers and vines. Even today, the number of tropical plants in the region remains a mystery. A trip to South America is a glimpse into the past. The film takes you on a journey that begins deep in the rainforest and ends in Patagonia with its glaciers and snow-capped volcanoes.

programme.title: Planet 4K

A journey through this area reveals everything that life has to offer. We visit Myanmar, where tourism is still in its infancy and undisturbed temples and nature are sights to behold. Then, in Cambodia we find the mysterious temples of Angkor. And finally, we head over to Vietnam to enjoy the beaches, rivers, and Buddhist pagodas.

programme.title: Frozen
programme.desc: Critics have called it "OPEN WATER on a ski lift" and "JAWS in the snow." It remains perhaps the most intense and terrifying film of the year: As Sunday evening falls, three snowboarding friends decide to take one last run down the slope. Halfway up the mountain, their chair lift stops, the lights go out and the resort closes for the week. They are stranded, but the worst is still to come. A storm is approaching. Frostbite is setting in. And on the ground below them, a pack of hungry wolves has gathered to wait. Kevin Zegers (DAWN OF THE DEAD, WRONG TURN), Shawn Ashmore (X-MEN, THE RUINS) and Emma Bell star in the relentlessly chilling thriller from writer/director Adam Green (HATCHET) that Harry Knowles of Ain't It Cool News hails as "a vicious, scary and horrifying experience...FROZEN is a howling good time!"

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Traverse The Dam, Bee Headed, Water Coffin
programme.desc: Are you worth a Dam? Suspended high over a dam is a 350-foot long tightrope with flags attached. Contestants would have to cross the tightrope and collect flags while holding on to a higher tightrope for support. The two men and the two women to collect the most flags in 5 minutes would advance to the next round. Stunt 2 is a real Bee. The ones left are covered with over 200,000 honeybees. Once covered, they would have stand for 2 minutes covered in bees. All contestants who completed this stunt would advance to the finals. For the finale, contestants are locked inside a Plexiglas box full of holes and submerged underwater. Once a red light came on, they would have to figure out which of 2 keys unlocked the coffin and swim to the surface. The contestant to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling

Action and chaos in the WOW Tag Team Division continues. And The Fabulous Lana Star stoops to a new level of in-ring-disrespect as she aims to secure victory through her prodigy, The Lioness at all costs.
